ItacPersonItem.Notes: Unde the anagram of Comeindo Muglielgini, and as Etneo Infecondo he signed La Catania destrutta (1695). Publications he singed as Accademico Infecondo, not in BL collections, include L`Innocenza vendicata, Azzione regicomica (1684).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
